title: AI giving bad advice to flatter its users
description: NEW YORK, March 29, (AP): Artificial intelligence chatbots are so prone to flattering and validating their human users that they are giving bad advice that can damage relationships...

title: Dana White dismisses fan complaints over UFC’s use of AI in 2026
description: Dana White has hit out at the UFC fanbase after learning about one of their latest criticisms. Last Saturday, the promotion was back in Washington for UFC Seattle, with a middleweight bout between Israel Adesanya and Joe Pyfer topping the card.

title: Pakistan joins sovereign AI white paper launch at ZGC Forum
description: BEIJING - Pakistani Embassy in China joined the launch of a sovereign AI white paper at the Zhongguancun Forum here, alongside partners from China, Brazil, Malaysia, Singapore, Vietnam, Thailand and Kazakhstan, China Economic Net (CEN) reported.
